CVE-2023-51774.title: The json-jwt (aka JSON::JWT) gem 1.16.3 for Ruby sometimes allows ...
CVE-2023-51774.description: The json-jwt (aka JSON::JWT) gem 1.16.3 for Ruby sometimes allows bypass of identity checks via a sign/encryption confusion attack. For example, JWE can sometimes be used to bypass JSON::JWT.decode.
